# W24T1 Implementation Plan

## Task Goal
Establish the type-conversion module surface. Define the sealed `CastElement` gate in `convert`, and make sure `CastTo<T>` has exactly one owner, `src/element/mod.rs`, per the detailed design.

## Related Design Documents
- `design/21-type.md` §3, §4.2, §5.1
- `design/03-element.md` §5.9
- `design/01-architecture.md` §1.4, §1.5, §3
- `design/00-coding.md` §2.1, §2.2, §2.3, §2.5, §2.7, §3.1

## Dependencies
- W4T2, `Element`
- W8T1, `TensorBase<S, D>`
- The sealed-trait infrastructure from W1T4

## Files to Create/Modify
- `src/convert/mod.rs`
- `src/convert/cast.rs`
- `src/element/mod.rs`, only if `CastTo<T>` is still missing from the earlier wave

## Implementation Details
### Single owner of `CastTo<T>`
```rust
pub trait CastTo<T>: Element {
    fn cast_to(self) -> Result<T, XenonError>;
}
```

- This trait belongs in `src/element/mod.rs`, not in `src/convert/cast.rs`.
- `convert` consumes the trait and must not define a second copy.
- `bool` must not implement `CastTo<T>` for any target.

### Conversion gate in `convert`
```rust
pub trait CastElement: Element + private::Sealed {}

impl CastElement for i32 {}
impl CastElement for i64 {}
impl CastElement for f32 {}
impl CastElement for f64 {}
impl CastElement for Complex<f32> {}
impl CastElement for Complex<f64> {}
```

- `bool` is intentionally excluded.
- No extra public traits are needed.

### Module root
```rust
mod cast;

pub use crate::element::CastTo;
pub use cast::CastElement;
```

- Keep the conversion surface centered on `cast.rs`.
- Re-export the trait from its real owner instead of redefining it.

## Test Plan
- Compile check that `CastElement` exists only for the documented six types.
- Compile check that `CastTo<T>` remains available from `element` and is re-exported from `convert`.
- Compile-fail coverage that `bool` is not a `CastElement` and does not participate in `.cast()`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `CastTo<T>` has exactly one definition, in `src/element/mod.rs`.
- `CastElement` exists in `src/convert/cast.rs` with the six documented impls.
- `src/convert/mod.rs` re-exports the intended conversion surface.
- `bool` is excluded at the trait level.
- No duplicate trait definitions exist.

## Development Workflow
1. Add or verify the `CastTo<T>` trait in `src/element/mod.rs`.
2. Write compile checks for the `CastElement` boundary.
3. Implement `CastElement` and the `convert` module skeleton.
4. Re-run the compile checks and stop after the first clean pass.
